hero.title: Kirkouski Typographic
hero.subtitle: Typography symbols at your fingertips — for Polish and Russian keyboards

download.title: Download
download.subtitle: Get the layout for your system

windows.step1: Download {dll} and {script} from the latest release
windows.step2: Place both files in the same folder
windows.step3: Right-click {script} and select "Run with PowerShell" (it auto-elevates to admin)
windows.step5: Go to Settings > Time & Language > Language & Region > Keyboard and add the new layout
windows.loginScreen: To apply to login screen: Win+R > intl.cpl > Administrative > Copy settings > check both boxes
windows.uninstall: To uninstall, run the script again — it detects the install and offers uninstall interactively.
windows.hardCleanup: If Explorer crashes: run {cmd} to remove all traces.

macos.step1: Download the {file} file from the latest release
macos.step2: Copy to {userPath} (current user) or {systemPath} (all users + login screen, requires sudo)
macos.step3: Log out and log back in
macos.step4: Open System Settings > Keyboard > Input Sources and add the layout

about.title: About
about.description: This project extends standard keyboard layouts with typographic symbols accessible via AltGr (Right Alt). Em dashes, curly quotes, copyright signs, currency symbols, and more — all without switching layouts or memorizing Unicode codes.
